payload.answer: User intervention required to clarify the ambiguous reference to 'Sam' in the note. Cloud escalation is disabled, and model confidence is low for this case.

entity_resolution.reason: Ambiguous reference to 'Sam' cannot be resolved automatically due to low confidence and disabled cloud escalation. Potential disambiguation needed (e.g., 'Sam [Smith]', 'Sam [project]', etc.).

memory_cards.statement: Cloud escalation disabled and model confidence low for ambiguous Sam note

details: Automated resolution failed due to low-confidence ambiguity in 'Sam' reference.
Escalation to user is the only viable option under current constraints.

repair_options: Ask user to specify which 'Sam' is referenced (e.g., 'Sam [last name]', 'Sam [project]', etc.).
Temporarily enable cloud escalation for this specific case (if allowed by system policies).
Flag the note for manual review by a human operator.
